title: digitalis transiens
intro: Digitalis transiens, also known as the slender foxglove or tall foxglove, is a plant species within the Digitalis genus, characterized by its slender stems and tubular bells of flowers. The plant contains glycosides, specifically digoxin and digitoxin, which possess medicinal properties that have been used to treat various heart conditions, such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of Digitalis transiens include its ability to strengthen the heart, improve heart rate regulation, and enhance cardiac output. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tinctures, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
